label: Subagent • live spawn persona digest
query: Spawn a persona and get back a compact digest.
notes: LIVE. Runs the real SpawnTool through the host + TextSubagentKind against a spawnable persona named 'sparky'. SKIPS automatically on any host where 'sparky' is not marked spawnable / has no model (the host returns rejected/unavailable). To run it: create an agent named 'sparky', mark it spawnable, and give it a model in Spawn & Delegation settings.

subagent.input: In one sentence, summarize what a bounded sub-agent is.
